---
title: "skills"
date: '2026-03-13'
categories: [project, ai, agents, claude code]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/skills"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/skills"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/skills"
stars: 0
project_lang: "Python"
---

A collection of agent skills for Claude Code and other AI assistants — reusable, composable tasks that extend what agents can do out of the box.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/skills)
